DATE OF THE CURRENT MUNICIPAL URBAN PLANNING INSTRUMENT

detalle: Average housing price relative to average household income

nombre: Population with income below 40% of the median
detalle: Share of the population whose income falls below 40% of the national median income. A severe poverty indicator measuring the fraction of the population in serious economic exclusion.
Central value of the equivalised household income distribution: 50% of the population earns more and 50% earns less. Used as the reference for relative poverty thresholds.
Share of the population with equivalised income below 60% of the national median (modified OECD scale). Standard European relative poverty indicator (AROPE).
Percentage of children under 18 living in households with income below the relative poverty threshold (60% of the national median).
Number of beneficiaries of the Guaranteed Citizenship Income (Renda Garantida de Ciutadania) per 10,000 municipal inhabitants.

nombre: Share of persons with disabilities receiving a pension
detalle: Percentage of persons with a recognised degree of disability who receive a non-contributory or contributory disability pension.
Number of municipal facilities designated as freely accessible climate shelters for the public, per 10,000 inhabitants.

nombre: Organic agricultural area (share of total agricultural area)
detalle: Percentage of the municipality's utilised agricultural area devoted to certified organic production.
Agricultural land area available per 100 municipal inhabitants, as an indicator of local agricultural production capacity.

Proportion of total agricultural area occupied by small-scale holdings. A small-scale holding is defined as one below the 40th percentile of net area per holding calculated at the Catalonia level per year.
Proportion of the total number of agricultural holdings in the municipality classified as small-scale (below the 40th percentile of net area per holding at the Catalonia level).

nombre: Employment rate in the agricultural sector
detalle: Percentage of workers registered with Social Security in the agricultural sector (NACE 01–03) relative to the municipality's active population.
Number of operators registered with the Catalan Council for Organic Agricultural Production (CCPAE) per 10,000 municipal inhabitants.
Number of deaths of children under one year of age per 1,000 live births in the municipality.
Mortality rate from viral hepatitis (ICD-10: B15–B19) per 100,000 inhabitants.
Mortality rate from tuberculosis (ICD-10: A15–A19 and B90) per 100,000 inhabitants.
Mortality rate from AIDS and HIV-related diseases (ICD-10: B20–B24 and R75) per 100,000 inhabitants.
Mortality rate from infectious diseases of the respiratory tract (ICD-10: J09–J18) per 100,000 inhabitants.
Mortality rate from non-communicable diseases (cardiovascular, cancers, diabetes, chronic respiratory diseases) per 100,000 inhabitants.
All-cause mortality rate for persons under 65 per 100,000 inhabitants in the same age group.
Mortality rate from intentional self-harm (ICD-10: X60–X84) per 100,000 inhabitants.
Mortality rate from malignant neoplasms of the respiratory system (ICD-10: C33–C34) per 100,000 inhabitants.

nombre: Deaths from alcohol and drug abuse
detalle: Mortality rate from mental and behavioural disorders due to psychoactive substance use (ICD-10: F10–F19) per 100,000 inhabitants.
Mortality rate from motor vehicle accidents recorded in the municipality, per 100,000 inhabitants.
Number of live births to mothers aged 15–19 per 1,000 women in the same age group.

nombre: Population with lower secondary education at most
detalle: Percentage of the population aged 25–64 whose highest educational attainment is compulsory secondary education.
Number of early childhood education places (first cycle, ages 0–3) available per 100 children in the municipality.

nombre: Population with upper secondary education at most
detalle: Percentage of the population aged 25–64 whose highest educational attainment is upper secondary or intermediate vocational training.
Percentage of the population aged 18–24 enrolled in university or higher-level studies.

nombre: Population with tertiary education or higher
detalle: Percentage of the population aged 25–64 holding a university degree or equivalent.
Ratio of women's to men's tertiary education access rate in the municipality.
Average number of pupils per teacher in publicly-owned educational establishments in the municipality.

nombre: Unemployment rate gap between women and men
detalle: Difference in percentage points between the female and male unemployment rates in the municipality.

nombre: Share of elected positions held by women
detalle: Proportion of female council members in the municipal government.
Percentage of working-age women (16–64) registered as unemployed relative to the total female active population in the municipality.
Percentage of women aged 16–64 registered with Social Security relative to the total working-age female population in the municipality.
Water price (in €/m³) including supply charge, water levy and sewerage.
Total volume of water consumed per inhabitant per year in the municipality.

nombre: Household income share spent on energy
detalle: Expenditure on electricity, gas and other fuels as a share of household disposable income at the municipal level. An energy vulnerability indicator reflecting the proportion of income that households devote to covering basic energy needs.
Total final electricity consumption per inhabitant in the municipality.
Total value of goods and services produced in the municipality per inhabitant, in current euros.

Synthetic index measuring the degree to which a municipality depends on one or few employment sectors, combining the deviation of its productive structure from the regional pattern and the intensity of concentration in the dominant sector.
Percentage of the population aged 16–64 registered with Social Security relative to the total working-age population in the municipality.
Percentage of the municipality's active population that is registered as unemployed.

nombre: Share of public procurement awarded to SMEs
detalle: Proportion of the total value of public contracts awarded to small and medium-sized enterprises in the municipality.
Percentage of unemployed persons over 45 relative to total registered unemployed in the municipality.
Percentage of unemployed persons under 25 relative to total registered unemployed in the municipality.
Percentage of registered employment contracts that are temporary relative to total registered contracts in the municipality.
Number of tourist accommodation places (hotels, campsites, apartments, tourist dwellings, rural houses) per inhabitant of the municipality.
Proportion of workers registered with Social Security in the industrial sector (NACE 10–33) relative to the working-age population of the municipality.
Number of enterprises in knowledge-intensive sectors (NACE: 62, 63, 69, 70, 71, 72, 73, 74) per 10,000 municipal inhabitants.
Number of national patent applications with inventors domiciled in the municipality per 10,000 inhabitants.
Percentage of dwellings in the municipality with access to broadband (≥ 30 Mbps) or ultra-fast broadband (≥ 100 Mbps).
Ratio between the average income of the top 20% of households and that of the bottom 20% in the municipality.
Average gross income per inhabitant of the municipality, calculated from tax data and the living conditions survey.
Measure of inequality in household income distribution in the municipality. A value of 0 represents perfect equality and 1 represents maximum inequality.

Share of the population residing in vulnerable census tracts relative to the territory's total population. A census tract is considered vulnerable when more than 21% of its population has equivalised income below 40% of the national median or this proportion is more than double the city's average share of vulnerable population.
Ratio of the dependent population (under 16 and over 64) to the working-age population (16–64).
Percentage of employed foreign nationals relative to the total working-age foreign population.

nombre: Population with income below 50% of the median (men)
detalle: Proportion of men whose income falls below 50% of the national median income.

nombre: Population with income below 50% of the median (women)
detalle: Proportion of women whose income falls below 50% of the national median income.
Percentage of gross household income spent on primary residence rent. Calculated as the ratio of average annual rent to average gross household income at the municipal level.
Evolution of rental housing prices in the municipality relative to a base year, as calculated by INE.

nombre: Daytime noise comfort (Municipal Sustainability Indicator System)
detalle: Percentage of the population exposed to daytime noise levels below regulatory limits (dB(A)).

nombre: Night-time noise comfort (Municipal Sustainability Indicator System)
detalle: Percentage of the population exposed to night-time noise levels below regulatory limits (dB(A)).
Area occupied by road, rail and logistics infrastructure relative to the municipal territory.
Percentage of the municipality's coastline included in a marine or coastal environmental protection designation.
Annual mean concentration of nitrogen dioxide (NO₂) measured by the municipality's monitoring stations.

nombre: Days exceeding the WHO PM10 limit
detalle: Number of days per year on which PM10 particle concentration exceeds the WHO recommended limit (15 µg/m³ daily average).
Proportion of the municipality's beaches that have been awarded the Blue Flag distinction for water quality and services.
Percentage of municipal waste collected through selective collection (source-separated fractions) relative to total waste generated.

nombre: Household waste generation per inhabitant per year
detalle: Kilograms of household waste generated per inhabitant per year in the municipality.
Number of registered tourist dwellings (HUT) per 100 dwellings in the municipality's residential stock.

nombre: Total greenhouse gas emissions per inhabitant
detalle: Total greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions of the municipality per inhabitant, in tonnes of CO₂ equivalent.
Percentage of inland or coastal bathing zones classified as excellent under Directive 2006/7/EC.
Number of educational centres per 10,000 inhabitants.
Number of health centres or hospitals per 10,000 inhabitants.
Number of sports facilities per 10,000 inhabitants.
Number of selective collection facilities per 10,000 inhabitants.
Proportion of the municipal area occupied by urban or developable land (buildings, infrastructure, industrial zones).
Number of criminal offences known to law enforcement per 1,000 inhabitants of the municipality.
Number of intentional homicides and murders per 100,000 inhabitants of the municipality.
Number of arrests for drug-trafficking-related offences per 100,000 inhabitants of the municipality.
Proportion of own revenue (chapters 1, 2, 3 and 5) relative to total revenue in the municipality's settled budget.
Percentage of registered voters who exercised their right to vote in the most recent municipal elections.
Amount of the municipality's outstanding financial debt per inhabitant, in euros.

nombre: Revenue from business tax and property tax
detalle: Total revenue collected from the Business Activities Tax (IAE) and the Property Tax (IBI) per inhabitant, in euros.
Number of non-governmental development organisations (NGDOs) registered with the regional government and headquartered in the municipality per 10,000 inhabitants.

nombre: Budget allocated to official development assistance
detalle: Amount of the municipal budget allocated to development cooperation and official development assistance (ODA) per inhabitant.
Number of cultural facilities (museums, libraries, theatres, civic centres, etc.) per 10,000 inhabitants of the municipality.
Green area (in sq m) per inhabitant in consolidated urban land.
Proportion of the municipal area covered by forest masses (dense forest, open woodland, scrubland).

nombre: Municipal area under a protection designation with an open-space management body
detalle: Percentage of the municipal area included in protected natural spaces with an active management plan.
Proportion of the municipal area classified as non-developable land relative to the total municipal territory.
Number of banks, credit cooperatives, community credit branches and credit financial establishments in the municipality per 1,000 inhabitants.

nombre: Ratio of land consumption rate to population growth rate
detalle: Ratio between the rate of growth of artificialised land and the rate of population growth over the same period.

nombre: Terrestrial ecosystem connectivity index of Catalonia
detalle: Indicator based on the ecological connectivity index of ecosystems as described by the Junta de Andalucía in "Plan Director para la Mejora de la Conectividad Ecológica en Andalucía. Una Estrategia de Infraestructura Verde" (May 2018). The calculation takes into account the distances between terrestrial natural spaces of the same type (forests, grasslands, etc.) and the artificial infrastructure that fragments them. Two natural spaces are considered connected when they are less than 2,500 m apart and are not divided by any artificial infrastructure. The indicator weights the connectance percentage of each ecosystem by the proportion of total studied natural area it represents within the municipality.

nombre: Share of buildings built from 2010 onwards
detalle: Percentage of the building stock built since 2010 relative to total buildings.
Percentage of unemployed persons under 25 relative to total unemployed. Based on registered unemployment data by municipality disaggregated by age group.

nombre: Percentage of patients readmitted within 30 days for selected conditions
detalle: Proportion of patients readmitted to a SISCAT hospital within 30 days of discharge, for a set of selected conditions: COPD, pneumonia, asthma, congestive heart failure, angina pectoris, AMI, urinary tract infections, diabetes mellitus complications and femoral neck fracture.

nombre: Treated prevalence of any mental health or addiction diagnosis
detalle: Number of persons treated at an Outpatient Mental Health Centre (CSMA) for any mental health or addiction disorder, per 100,000 inhabitants. Includes diagnoses of anxiety, stress disorders, suicidal ideation, mood disorders, addictions and neurodevelopmental disorders.
Percentage of the population with an obesity diagnosis (BMI ≥ 30) recorded by a healthcare professional in the public health system's medical records.

Number of conventional hospitalisation discharges with a main diagnosis classified as potentially avoidable for the population aged 19 and over, per 100,000 inhabitants. Conditions: diabetes mellitus complications, congestive heart failure, COPD, asthma, angina pectoris, urinary tract infections, bacterial pneumonia, dehydration and hypertension.
Percentage of persons who obtain an appointment with their primary and community care reference professional (family doctor or nurse) within a maximum of 10 days from the request.

Composite indicator averaging two vaccination coverages: the percentage of persons aged 60 and over vaccinated against seasonal influenza, and the percentage of children aged 5 who have received two doses of the MMR vaccine (measles, mumps and rubella).
